typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		CombID as string,
		WAMSourceID as string,
		Server_WFGUID as string,
		Level3_Name as string,
		Level4_Name as string,
		Host_Name as string,
		EDL_Flag as string,
		EDL_SeniorLead as string,
		EDL_TechManager as string,
		DEVICE_WF_GUID as string,
		LEVEL_1_REPORT_NAME as string,
		LEVEL_2_REPORT_NAME as string,
		LEVEL_3_REPORT_NAME as string,
		LEVEL_4_REPORT_NAME as string,
		MANAGER as string,
		MANAGED_BY_GROUP_GUID as string,
		MANAGER_EMAIL as string,
		Cluster_Type as string,
		OPERATION_STATUS_DESCRIPTION as string,
		APP_CIO as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	format: 'table',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource derive(Import_Date = currentDate(),
		Derived_Column_1 = toString(APP_CIO)) ~> ImportDate
ImportDate sink(input(
		App_CIO as string,
		Host_Name as string,
		MANAGER_EMAIL as string,
		Level4_Name as string,
		Import_Date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		LEVEL_3_REPORT_NAME as string,
		Cluster_Type as string,
		LEVEL_2_REPORT_NAME as string,
		Level3_Name as string,
		EDL_TechManager as string,
		LEVEL_4_REPORT_NAME as string,
		DEVICE_WF_GUID as string,
		LEVEL_1_REPORT_NAME as string,
		MANAGER as string,
		DeviceManagedByGroup as string,
		Operational_Status_Desc as string,
		EDL_SeniorLead as string,
		EDL_Flag as string,
		WAMSourceID as string,
		Server_WFGUID as string,
		CombID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		App_CIO = Derived_Column_1,
		Host_Name,
		MANAGER_EMAIL,
		Level4_Name,
		Import_Date,
		LEVEL_3_REPORT_NAME,
		Cluster_Type,
		LEVEL_2_REPORT_NAME,
		Level3_Name,
		EDL_TechManager,
		LEVEL_4_REPORT_NAME,
		DEVICE_WF_GUID,
		LEVEL_1_REPORT_NAME,
		MANAGER,
		DeviceManagedByGroup = MANAGED_BY_GROUP_GUID,
		Operational_Status_Desc = OPERATION_STATUS_DESCRIPTION,
		EDL_SeniorLead,
		EDL_Flag,
		WAMSourceID,
		Server_WFGUID,
		CombID)) ~> ServerRelationshipStatic
